Class LockScreen

java.lang.Object
ui.BaseScreen
ui.LockScreen
public class LockScreen extends BaseScreen
Screen shown at startup when a PIN has been set.

The user must enter the correct PIN to reach the dashboard. After AuthManager.MAX_ATTEMPTS consecutive failures the screen shows a countdown timer and blocks further attempts until the lockout expires.

  • Constructor Details

    • LockScreen

      public LockScreen(App app)
      Constructs the LockScreen.
      Parameters:
      app - the central application controller

  • Method Details

    • onUnlockClicked

      public void onUnlockClicked()
      Handles the unlock button click. Checks lockout status first, then verifies the entered PIN. Navigates to the dashboard on success, or shows an appropriate error.

    • showLockoutMessage

      public void showLockoutMessage(int secondsRemaining)
      Displays the lockout message with the remaining wait time.
      Parameters:
      secondsRemaining - seconds until the lockout expires

    • showWrongPinError

      public void showWrongPinError()
      Displays the incorrect PIN error message.

    • navigateToDashboard

      public void navigateToDashboard()
      Navigates to the dashboard screen after successful authentication.

    • initComponents

      protected void initComponents()
      Initialises all UI components (fields, buttons, labels, etc.). Called before BaseScreen.initLayout().
      Specified by:
      initComponents in class BaseScreen

    • initLayout

      protected void initLayout()
      Arranges the initialised components into the BaseScreen.panel hierarchy. Called after BaseScreen.initComponents().
      Specified by:
      initLayout in class BaseScreen
